gaps.condition: Strategy unit has a basic signal scaffold but no validated entry, exit, and no-trade condition matrix.
gaps.impact: A PAPER result could be misread without knowing why entries were taken or blocked.
gaps.ux_impact: Operator cannot trace entry and no-trade reasons at a glance.
gaps.profitability_impact: Weakens diagnosis of missed entries, bad exits, and false positives.
gaps.fix: strategy_condition_matrix schema and validator now require entry, exit, no-trade, regime, risk-off/downtrend avoidance, evidence ids, false live flags, and negative fixtures; replay/paper outcome evidence remains required.

gaps.condition: Symbol selection is not yet tied to liquidity, volatility, spread, depth, and regime evidence.
gaps.impact: Candidate selection can look complete while market fit is unproven.
gaps.ux_impact: Dashboard cannot explain why a symbol is eligible or filtered.
gaps.profitability_impact: Increases concentration and weak liquidity risk.
gaps.fix: market_regime_adaptation_report now requires fresh scoped regime data, symbol-regime fit, strategy condition matrix, strategy performance memory, paper/shadow evidence, and fail-closed downtrend/risk-off blocking before any entry review.

gaps.condition: VWAP reversion, trend pullback, and breakout/retest are not yet linked to regime-specific evidence.
gaps.impact: Different strategy families can be ranked without knowing which regime they were valid in.
gaps.ux_impact: Operator sees strategy labels without a clear market context.
gaps.profitability_impact: Regime mismatch can dominate apparent edge.
gaps.fix: strategy_condition_matrix now maps VWAP_REVERSION, TREND_PULLBACK, and BREAKOUT_RETEST families to regime-scoped entry, exit, and no-trade guards; runtime performance evidence remains required.

gaps.condition: Risk sizing remains live-blocked, but paper exposure quality now has schema, validator, and negative fixtures; long-run and live-review evidence are still missing.
gaps.impact: Risk remains disabled safely while the operator can now see whether paper exposure quality is sufficient for review.
gaps.ux_impact: Paper exposure quality is now visible in the risk panel with PASS/INSUFFICIENT/BLOCKED status, sample counts, recommendation, and scale-up blocked wording.
gaps.profitability_impact: Creates a conservative feedback loop for exposure, concentration, drawdown, idempotency, and recovery quality.
gaps.fix: Added paper_exposure_quality_report schema, validator, PASS fixture, live/scale flag negative fixture, missing-evidence fixture, exposure-breach fixture, and LIVE-mode fixture. Scale-up remains blocked.

gaps.condition: Fee, spread, slippage, impact, and latency are schema-scaffolded but not proven in candidate ranking evidence.
gaps.impact: Raw paper performance could appear better than net tradable performance.
gaps.ux_impact: Dashboard cannot separate gross and net expected outcome.
gaps.profitability_impact: Cost blindness can invert candidate ranking.
gaps.fix: optimizer_feedback_report schema and execution_feedback_loop_validator now require expected-vs-realized fee, spread, slippage, impact, latency penalty, net EV deviation, ranking action, source evidence ids, false live flags, and negative fixtures; real paper/shadow execution accumulation remains required.

gaps.condition: Optimizer objective is not yet validated as net EV after all trading costs.
gaps.impact: Candidate ranking can be mistaken as mature while objective quality is unverified.
gaps.ux_impact: Operator cannot tell if a candidate is blocked by cost-adjusted edge.
gaps.profitability_impact: Ranking by incomplete objective can select fragile candidates.
gaps.fix: candidate_scorecard schema and validator now require NET_EV_AFTER_COST fields, explicit fee/spread/slippage/impact/latency costs, robustness status, evidence ids, false live flags, and negative fixtures; full strategy/runtime evidence remains required.

gaps.condition: OOS, walk-forward, bootstrap, and concentration diagnostics remain scaffold-level.
gaps.impact: Short-window improvements can look stronger than they are.
gaps.ux_impact: Operator cannot see whether a result is robust or only local.
gaps.profitability_impact: Overfit risk can dominate expected edge.
gaps.fix: convergence_assessment_report now requires the full parent dependency chain, dependency PASS counts, fresh input, model drift blocking, false live/scale fields, no writer input eligibility, and operator wording that separates display truth from live execution truth.

gaps.condition: Failure memory schemas exist but append-auditable failure learning is not yet evidence-backed.
gaps.impact: Repeated failure patterns may not be visible across cycles.
gaps.ux_impact: Operator cannot see if the same candidate failure is repeating.
gaps.profitability_impact: The system can waste cycles on candidates with unchanged root causes.
gaps.fix: convergence_assessment_report now requires the full parent dependency chain, dependency PASS counts, fresh input, model drift blocking, false live/scale fields, no writer input eligibility, and operator wording that separates display truth from live execution truth.

gaps.condition: Paper and shadow artifacts are separated, but scorecard inputs are not yet fully tied to session-hashed evidence.
gaps.impact: A candidate can be discussed without a complete evidence chain.
gaps.ux_impact: Operator cannot audit which session produced the displayed strategy assessment.
gaps.profitability_impact: Evidence drift can distort parameter adaptation.
gaps.fix: convergence_assessment_report now requires the full parent dependency chain, dependency PASS counts, fresh input, model drift blocking, false live/scale fields, no writer input eligibility, and operator wording that separates display truth from live execution truth.

gaps.condition: Dashboard now projects paper exposure quality into the risk panel, but profitability maturity still requires external and long-run evidence before live review.
gaps.impact: User may expect smarter trading behavior than the current scaffold supports.
gaps.ux_impact: Next improvement step is not obvious from the first screen.
gaps.profitability_impact: Reduces feedback quality for strategy improvement cycles.
gaps.fix: Read-only dashboard now shows Strategy Evidence Maturity with paper/shadow sample counts, optimizer ranking action, reason/cost evidence status, blue/yellow/red severity colors, and explicit live/scale-up blocked wording. Longer risk exposure quality and multi-cycle evidence maturity remain open.

safe_patch_actions: Record high-value profitability evidence gaps as live-review blockers.
Add validator coverage so a missing or misleading audit fails closed.
Add negative tests for live flag drift and missing component coverage.
Keep dashboard and optimizer outputs analysis-only until exact evidence exists.

safe_patch_actions.summary: Hardened candidate_scorecard schema and validator against raw-edge ranking without cost-adjusted net EV evidence.
Added strategy condition matrix schema, validator, and negative fixtures for entry/exit/no-trade/regime traceability.
Hardened symbol-regime fit schema and validator for liquidity, volatility, spread, depth, and regime evidence.
Hardened overfit diagnostic schema and validator for OOS, walk-forward, bootstrap, ranking stability, and bias checks.
Hardened optimizer feedback schema and validator so cost divergence blocks ranking without live permission.
Hardened failure analysis so unknown live-affecting root causes and repeated failures block ranking/promotion without live permission.
Hardened paper/shadow evidence accumulation so scorecard input requires session-hashed samples, freshness, reasons, and cost evidence without live permission.
Added dashboard Strategy Evidence Maturity UX and fail-closed validator/tests for scorecard input visibility without live or scale-up permission.
Hardened market regime adaptation schema and validator with stale data, dependency, risk-off, and live observation negative fixtures.
Hardened model drift schema and validator so stale input, detected drift, weak samples, and scale-up attempts fail closed.
Hardened convergence assessment schema and validator dependency chain; added negative fixtures for live flag, dependency, drift, writer-input, and scale-up failures.
Added paper exposure quality report schema, fail-closed validator, and negative fixtures so risk sizing exposure quality is paper-visible while live and scale-up stay blocked.
Bound paper_exposure_quality_report into the read-only dashboard risk panel and launcher-scoped loader while keeping all live and scale flags false.

operator_message: Profitability and optimizer maturity are still evidence-blocked. Continue PAPER or SHADOW evidence collection; do not treat these scaffolds as live readiness.
